name: @borjie/language-sota
description: Language-SOTA core (Wave 19G) — the bilingual abstraction layer powering Mr. Mwikila across six linguistic angles (pronunciation, grammar, intonation, code-switching, toggle, translation). Provides the data model, the ensemble language detector, the token-level code-switch tagger, the MFA-port phoneme aligner + PER scorer, the F0-contour prosody analyzer + SSML controller, the provider registry + quality tracker, and the per-user language profile manager. Downstream waves 19H–19K plug into the ports defined here. See Docs/DESIGN/LANGUAGE_VOICE_SOTA_SPEC.md.
